title: iberis saxatilis subsp. magnesiana
intro: Iberis saxatilis subsp. magnesiana, also known as rock candy or candy rock, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. It has been known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Iberis saxatilis subsp. magnesiana can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
